creator: arundel@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->patched

Indeed rum(4) is the proper driver for this device. I've checked usbdevs and 
if_rum.c and found the entries for "RT2573" (product id=0x2573) (the name 
"RT2570_3" in the initial patch was wrong). 
These entries are in 7.x, 8.x and HEAD!
